positive: A sophisticated and stylized whimsical astronaut floating through a nebula-filled cosmos. The astronaut, depicted in a clean, futuristic white and gold spacesuit, is gazing at a floating cluster of brightly colored, stylized celestial bodies—planets, moons, and star bursts. The composition is centered, with strong foreground silhouettes against a dramatic, deep indigo and electric cyan cosmic background. Use a vibrant, limited color palette emphasizing contrasts (gold/cyan/indigo). Highly detailed vector graphic illustration style, inspired by mid-century space age posters, suitable for screen printing. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, strong visual impact, central focus.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, grain, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, realistic photo, grayscale
